things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest waterfall - 1.7km wide and 108m high

things.description: Zambian history, traditional arts and the David Livingstone exhibition

things.name: Lusaka National Museum

things.name: Lower Zambezi National Park
things.description: Canoe safari on the Zambezi with elephants crossing the river

things.description: Orphaned elephant nursery caring for baby elephants rescued from the bush

things.name: Nshima with Relishes
things.description: Zambia's staple food - stiff white maize porridge with dried fish, rape leaves and groundnuts
